commands.title: Quick Scan - Top Ports + Version
commands.description: Fast service detection on the most common ports.

commands.title: Web Port Scan
commands.description: Common web and app ports with version detection.

commands.title: Full Port Scan
commands.description: All TCP ports with aggressive timing and OS/service detection.

commands.title: HTTP Enumeration Scripts
commands.description: NSE scripts for titles, headers, methods, and tech fingerprinting.

commands.title: SSL/TLS Analysis
commands.description: Certificate details, cipher enumeration, and known SSL issues.

commands.title: Naabu → Nmap Service Scan
commands.description: Port discovery with Naabu, then Nmap service/script scan on hits.

commands.title: Masscan - Full Range
commands.description: High-speed full TCP range scan. Follow up open ports with Nmap.

commands.title: Single Target - All Templates
commands.description: Run the full Nuclei template set against one URL.

commands.title: Critical & High Only
commands.description: Filter findings to critical and high severity.

commands.title: Panels / Default Login / Exposure
commands.description: Focused scan for admin panels, default creds, and exposed services.

commands.title: Tagged Templates (CVE / Exposure)
commands.description: Focused scan using cve, exposure, and misconfig tags.

commands.title: Scan URL List
commands.description: Run Nuclei against a list of live URLs from recon output.
commands.command: cat alive-urls.txt | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/ -severity medium,high,critical -c 50 -o nuclei-results.txt

commands.title: CORS Misconfiguration Templates
commands.description: CORS-specific templates across a list of live hosts.
commands.command: cat example.coms.txt | httpx -silent | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/cors/ -o cors_results.txt

commands.title: Httpx - Single Target
commands.description: Probe a URL for status, title, tech stack, and IP.

commands.title: Httpx - Probe External IP
commands.description: Check an IP for live web services on common ports (C2/panel triage).

commands.title: curl - Response Headers
commands.description: Quick header grab for server, redirects, and security headers.

commands.title: curl - Follow Redirect Chain
commands.description: Trace redirect chain and final response headers.

commands.title: Gobuster - Directory Brute Force
commands.description: Discover hidden directories and files on a web server.

commands.title: Gobuster - Vhost Discovery
commands.description: Brute force virtual hosts on the same IP.

commands.title: Web Recon Pipeline
commands.description: Port scan → probe live hosts → directory brute → Nuclei.
commands.command: nmap -sV -p 80,443,8080,8443 example.com -oG - | awk '/Status: Open/{print $2}' | httpx -silent -o alive.txt && gobuster dir -u https://example.com -w /usr/share/wordlists/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt -q -o gobuster.txt && nuclei -l alive.txt -severity critical,high -o nuclei.txt

commands.title: Httpx → Nuclei Sweep
commands.description: Probe hosts for live web services, then Nuclei scan.
commands.command: cat targets.txt | httpx -silent -status-code -title -tech-detect -o alive.txt && nuclei -l alive.txt -severity critical,high,medium -c 40 -o nuclei-sweep.txt

commands.title: Nmap → Httpx → Nuclei
commands.description: Port scan an IP, probe web ports, then vulnerability scan.
commands.command: nmap -sV -p 80,443,8080,8443 example.com -oG - | awk '/Status: Open/{print $2}' | httpx -silent -o alive.txt && nuclei -l alive.txt -tags panel,exposure,cve -severity high,critical -o nuclei.txt

commands.title: Git Repository Detection
commands.description: Probe hosts for exposed .git directories.

commands.title: AWS S3 Bucket Finder
commands.description: Scan for S3 buckets associated with the target domain.

commands.title: API Key Finder (JS)
commands.description: Search JavaScript files for exposed keys and tokens.
commands.command: cat allurls.txt | grep -E "\.js$" | httpx -mc 200 -content-type | grep -E "application/javascript|text/javascript" | cut -d' ' -f1 | xargs -I% curl -s % | grep -E "(API_KEY|api_key|apikey|secret|token|password)"

commands.title: Sensitive File Detection
commands.description: Grep collected URLs for sensitive file extensions.

commands.title: GAU URL Collection
commands.description: Collect historical URLs with gau and filter for parameters.

commands.title: Katana - Passive URL Collection
commands.description: Collect URLs from passive sources via katana.

commands.title: Katana + GAU Combined
commands.description: Multi-source URL collection and deduplication.
commands.command: echo example.com | gau --mc 200 | urldedupe > urls.txt && katana -u https://example.com -d 5 -o katana-urls.txt

commands.title: Subfinder - Basic Discovery
commands.description: Recursive subdomain enumeration with subfinder.

commands.title: Httpx - Live Subdomain Filter
commands.description: Filter discovered subdomains to alive hosts on common web ports.

commands.title: Gobuster - DNS Subdomain Enum
commands.description: Enumerate subdomains via DNS brute force.

commands.title: Subzy - Takeover Check
commands.description: Check for subdomain takeover vulnerabilities.

commands.title: XSS Hunting Pipeline
commands.description: URL collection → parameter filter → reflected XSS check.
commands.command: echo https://example.com/ | gau | gf xss | uro | Gxss | kxss | tee xss_output.txt

commands.title: Dalfox Scan
commands.description: Scan parameterized URLs with Dalfox and blind XSS callback.

commands.title: Stored XSS - Form Endpoints
commands.description: Nuclei XSS templates against auth-related endpoints.
commands.command: cat urls.txt | grep -E "(login|signup|register|forgot|password|reset)" | httpx -silent | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/xss/ -severity critical,high

commands.title: LFI with FFuF
commands.description: Parameter fuzzing for local file inclusion using ffuf.
commands.command: echo "https://example.com/" | gau | gf lfi | uro | sed 's/=.*/=/' | qsreplace "FUZZ" | sort -u | xargs -I{} ffuf -u {} -w payloads/lfi.txt -c -mr "root:(x|\*|\$[^\:]*):0:0:" -v

commands.title: Manual CORS Check
commands.description: Send a cross-origin request and inspect response headers.

commands.title: CORScanner
commands.description: Automated CORS misconfiguration scanner.

commands.title: Origin Reflection Test
commands.description: Test whether the server reflects arbitrary origins in ACAO header.

commands.title: LFI - Request File
commands.description: Bruteforce LFI using a saved HTTP request file.

commands.title: XSS - Request File
commands.description: Bruteforce XSS using a saved HTTP request file.

commands.title: Arjun - Passive
commands.description: Passive parameter discovery with Arjun.

commands.title: Arjun - Wordlist
commands.description: Active parameter discovery with a custom wordlist.

commands.title: JS File Collection + Nuclei
commands.description: Crawl for JS files and scan with exposure templates.
commands.command: echo example.com | katana -d 5 | grep -E "\.js$" | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/http/exposures/ -c 30

commands.title: JS File Nuclei Scan
commands.description: Run Nuclei exposure templates against collected JS URLs.

commands.title: WPScan - Aggressive
commands.description: Enumerate users, plugins, and themes with aggressive plugin detection.
commands.command: wpscan --url https://example.com --disable-tls-checks --api-token YOUR_TOKEN -e at -e ap -e u --enumerate ap --plugins-detection aggressive --force

commands.title: SSL Certificate Search
commands.description: Find hosts with certificates issued for the target domain.

commands.title: Shodan - IP Lookup
commands.description: Look up services and banners on a known external IP.
